libraryDescription:
This library, gui.HorizontalSliderPanel, provides a panel containing arranged horizontal sliders as a GUI component.

In the standard VCSSL library GUI, GUI components are handled as int IDs, but the GUI component provided by this module is handled as theHorizontalSliderPanel struct.

The HorizontalSliderPanel struct internally stores resource IDs and related data, but you normally do not need to be aware of its internals becausefunctions for creating and destroying it are provided. Direct access to its members is not recommended.
Specifically, create it with the newHorizontalSliderPanel function and destroy it with thedeleteComponent function.

This module also provides overloads of standard GUI library functions so that the HorizontalSliderPanel struct can be handled almost in the sameway as in the standard library GUI.
For example, the mountComponent, setComponentSize, andsetComponentLocation functions are provided.

function0.name: newHorizontalSliderPanel
function0.declaration: HorizontalSliderPanel newHorizontalSliderPanel(int x, int y, int width, int height, string labelText[ ], float defaultValue[ ], float minValue[ ], float maxValue[ ])
function0.parameters:
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the panel. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the panel. 
(int type) width : The width of the panel. 
(int type) height : The height of the panel. 
(string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text. 
labelWidth : The width of the label area. 
(float[] type) defaultValue : The array storing the initial values of the sliders. 
(float[] type) minValue : The array storing the minimum values of the sliders. 
(float[] type) maxValue : The array storing the minimum values of the sliders.
function0.returnValue: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) The created slider panel struct.

function1.name: newHorizontalSliderPanel
function1.declaration: HorizontalSliderPanel newHorizontalSliderPanel(int x, int y, int width, int height, string labelText[ ], int defaultValue[ ], int minValue[ ], int maxValue[ ])
function1.parameters:
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the panel. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the panel. 
(int type) width : The width of the panel. 
(int type) height : The height of the panel. 
(string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text. 
labelWidth : The width of the label area. 
(int[] type) defaultValue : The array storing the initial values of the sliders. 
(int[] type) minValue : The array storing the minimum values of the sliders. 
(int[] type) maxValue : The array storing the minimum values of the sliders.
function1.returnValue: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) The created slider panel struct.

function2.name: deleteComponent
function2.parameters: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The slider panel to be destroyed.

function3.name: paintComponent
function3.parameters: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The slider panel to be repainted.

function4.name: mountComponent
function4.description: Mounts a slider panel onto another GUI component.
function4.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The slider panel to be mounted. 
(int type) componentID : The destination GUI component ID.

function5.name: demountComponent
function5.description: Demounts a slider panel from another GUI component.
function5.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The slider panel to be demounted. 
(int type) componentID : The destination GUI component ID.

function6.name: setTextLabelWidth
function6.description: Sets the width of the label area.
function6.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(int type) labelWidth : The width of the label area.

function7.name: setLabelWidth
function7.description: This function is supported for compatibility. Use getTextLabelWidth.Sets the width of the label area.
function7.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(int type) labelWidth : The width of the label area.

function8.name: getPanel
function8.description: Returns the component ID of the panel.
function8.parameters: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel.
function8.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the panel.

function9.name: getHorizontalSlider
function9.description: Gets the slider corresponding to the specified label.
function9.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(string type) labelText : The label text corresponding to the slider to get.
function9.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the slider.

function10.name: getHorizontalSlider
function10.description: Gets the slider at the specified index.
function10.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(int type) index : The index of the slider.
function10.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the slider.

function11.name: getComponentSize
function11.description: Returns the size of the panel.
function11.parameters: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel.
function11.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the size of the panel.

function12.name: setComponentSize
function12.declaration: void setComponentSize(HorizontalSliderPanel &panelInstance, int width, int height)
function12.description: Sets the size of the panel.
function12.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(int type) width : The width of the panel. 
(int type) height : The height of the panel.

function13.name: setComponentSize
function13.description: Automatically adjusts the sizes of the internal components to match the current panel size. Use this when the panel size has been changed externally.
function13.parameters: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel.

function14.name: getComponentLocation
function14.description: Returns the location of the panel.
function14.parameters: (HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel.
function14.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the location of the panel.

function15.name: setComponentLocation
function15.description: Sets the location of the panel.
function15.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderPanel type) panelInstance : The target slider panel. 
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the window.
